name: Install your Epson Printer and Cash Drawer

If the printer is not your default printer, click 'change' and select the Epson printer from the list."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Clear the print headers and footers checkboxes and change the paper size to 72mm - 2000mm or 72mm - receipt. If you have a Epson tm-t88v printer, this must be set to 80mm."}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you do not disable headers and footers, the printer will not auto cut at the main receipt and a URL and other irrelevant information will be printed on your receipts."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Install your cash drawer"}], "data-id": "install-your-cash-drawer"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "So that your cash drawer opens when you print a receipt or when you click CTRL + E you must set it up through your printer."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Plug the RJ12 connector cable (the one that looks like a phone line) into the receipt printer from the cash drawer."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Go to your 'devices and printers' control panel on your windows device. This usually found by going to \"Control Panel\" under the \"Start\" menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Right click on your Epson receipt printer and select \"Printer Preferences\""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the \"Peripherals\" tab"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select \"Cash Drawer\" from the drop down menu"}]}, {"type": printer preferences."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Complete a sale in Maropost If the Epson printer is not your default printer, click 'change' and select the Epson printer from the list."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Untick print headers and footers and change the paper size to 72mm - 2000mm or 72mm - receipt. If you have a Epson tm-t88v printer, this must be set to 80mm."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": If you do not disable headers and footers, the printer will not auto cut at the main receipt and a URL and other irrelevant information will be printed on your receipts."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Install your cash drawer"}], "data-id": "install-your-cash-drawer-1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "So that your cash drawer opens when you print a receipt or when you click Command + E you must set it up through your printer."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Plug the RJ12 connector cable (the one that looks like a phone line) into the receipt printer from the cash drawer."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Go to: "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A631%2Fprinters%2F", "children": [{"text": "http://localhost:631/printers/ "}]}, {"text": " in your safari browser. This will open CUPS."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "\tIf you receive this error: \"The web interface is currently disabled. Run \"cupsctl WebInterface=yes\" to enable it\", you will need to enable it."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select your Epson printer from the list of available printers"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "From the drop down menu, select \"Set Default Options\""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select 'Cash Drawer Control', choose 'Open Drawer 1 and 2' under 'Cash Drawer'"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the 'Set Default Options' button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To test the cash drawer connection, hit Command + E when in Maropost POS or print a receipt after completing a sale."}]}]
